name: Chicken with Artichokes & Olives
recipeIngredient: 1 Each Spanish Onion, Halved Lengthwise, thinly sliced
1 Cup Reduced Sodium Chicken Broth, defatted
14 Ounces Artichoke Hearts, Drained & Rinsed, sliced thin
recipeInstructions:
1. Season the chicken thighs with salt and pepper.
2. In a Dutch oven or skillet, heat 1 teaspoon of oil over medium heat. Add the chicken thighs and brown well on all sides. Transfer to a plate lined with paper towels to drain.
3. Reduce the heat to low and add the remaining oil. Add the onions and sugar and cook, stirring until the onions are a deep golden color, approximately 10 minutes.
4. Add the garlic and olives and cook for 1 minute, stirring. Stir in the wine and thyme and cook until the wine has almost evaporated, about 5 minutes.
5. Add the chicken broth and artichoke hearts along with the chicken pieces. Cover and simmer over low heat until the chicken is tender and no longer pink, about 1/2 hour.
6. Transfer the chicken using tongs to a serving plate and keep warm. Increase the heat to high and let boil, uncovered for about 5 minutes or until slightly thickened.
7. Taste and adjust seasonings if needed. Spoon the sauce over the chicken and serve immediately.
